# Visual Studio temporary files
.vs/
x64/
Debug/
Release/

# User-specific Visual Studio files
*.user
*.suo
*.rsuser

# Build outputs
*.exe
*.obj
*.pdb
*.ilk
*.log
*.tlog
*.lastbuildstate
*.idb
*.ipdb
*.iobj

# VS Code settings, optional
.vscode/

# Runtime generated files
bank_data.txt
statement_*.txt
